title: Opinion: Former surgeon general: The Senate must not approve someone who can’t practice medicine as the nation’s top doctor
description: “The surgeon general is not a wellness influencer,” writes former Surgeon General Jerome Adams of Casey Means.
content: “The surgeon general is not a wellness influencer,” writes former Surgeon General Jerome Adams of Casey Means.
